interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedCategories
interfaces.description: Get main product categories to feature on the homepage hero and navigation shortcuts.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedProducts
interfaces.description: Get a curated list of featured machines for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getHomeUpcomingEventsHighlight
interfaces.description: Get upcoming trade shows and events to promote on the homepage, prioritizing those with on-site demos.

interfaces.name: getHomeFinancingHighlight
interfaces.description: Get teaser content for financing offers to display on the homepage.

interfaces.name: getCategoryDetails
interfaces.description: Get display information for a product category page header and breadcrumbs.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options (players, power, width, price, sort) for a product category listing.

interfaces.name: getCategoryProducts
interfaces.description: Get a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of products for a given category.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full product information for the product detail page, including specs and related manuals summary.

interfaces.name: getProductSupportResources
interfaces.description: Get manuals and downloads related to a specific product for display on the product detail page.

interfaces.name: addProductToQuoteList
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current quote list (creating a new open quote list if none exists).

interfaces.name: getQuoteListSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the current quote list for header/cart icon display.

interfaces.name: getQuoteListDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details of the current quote list for the quote page, including all items.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteListItem
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an item in the current quote list.

interfaces.name: removeQuoteListItem
interfaces.description: Remove a product line from the current quote list.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit the current quote list as a quote request to sales, with contact details.

interfaces.name: addProductToProject
interfaces.description: Add a product to the current project/wish list (creating a draft project if needed).

interfaces.name: getProjectSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the current project for header/project icon display.

interfaces.name: getCurrentProjectDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details of the current project/wish list, including all machines and metadata.

interfaces.name: updateProjectItem
interfaces.description: Update quantity or notes for a machine in the current project/wish list.

interfaces.name: removeProjectItem
interfaces.description: Remove a machine from the current project/wish list.

interfaces.name: reorderProjectItems
interfaces.description: Reorder machines in the current project/wish list based on a new item order.

parameters.name: itemOrder
parameters.description: Array of project_item_id values in the desired display order.

interfaces.name: updateProjectMetadata
interfaces.description: Update basic metadata fields for the current project, such as project name and venue.

interfaces.name: saveCurrentProject
interfaces.description: Persist the current project/wish list as a saved project and mark it as saved.

interfaces.name: getSupportOverview
interfaces.description: Get content for the support overview page, including sections for manuals, technical support, and service requests.

interfaces.name: getManualFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the manuals & downloads page.

interfaces.name: searchManuals
interfaces.description: Search manuals and technical documents by query, type, date range, and sort order.

interfaces.name: getManualDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific manual document, including file URL.

interfaces.name: initiateManualDownload
interfaces.description: Prepare a manual for download and return the file URL to initiate the PDF download.

interfaces.name: getServiceFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the service request form, including service types and product categories.

interfaces.name: getServiceModelsForCategory
interfaces.description: Get a list of product models for a given category to populate the service request model dropdown.

interfaces.name: submitServiceRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a technical service or on-site maintenance request.

parameters.name: preferredDateTime
parameters.description: Preferred date and time in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2026-06-10T10:00:00'.

interfaces.name: getDistributorSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get available regions and countries for the distributor locator filters.

interfaces.name: searchDistributors
interfaces.description: Search for distributors by region, country, and city or postal code.

parameters.name: cityOrPostal
parameters.description: City name or postal code, e.g., 'Berlin'.

interfaces.name: getDistributorDetails
interfaces.description: Get full contact details and service territories for a specific distributor.

interfaces.name: submitDistributorInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a message to a specific distributor via their contact form.

interfaces.name: getEvents
interfaces.description: Get a list of events for the events listing page with optional filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event, including location and on-site demo information.

interfaces.name: getEventAvailableDemoSlots
interfaces.description: Get available demo dates and 15-minute time slots for a specific event.

interfaces.name: submitDemoRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a 15-minute product demo slot at an event.

parameters.name: selectedDate
parameters.description: Selected event day as ISO date, e.g., '2026-03-15'.

interfaces.name: getFinancingOverview
interfaces.description: Get descriptive content for the financing & leasing overview page.

interfaces.name: getFinancingPlanOptions
interfaces.description: Get available financing plan options (e.g., 36-month, 48-month) for display in the calculator.

interfaces.name: calculateFinancingPayments
interfaces.description: Calculate estimated monthly payments for one or more financing terms for a given equipment price.

parameters.name: termMonthsList
parameters.description: List of term lengths to calculate, e.g., [36, 48].

interfaces.name: submitFinancingInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a short financing inquiry for a selected plan and equipment price.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get market segment and email frequency options for the newsletter signup form.

interfaces.name: submitNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Submit a newsletter subscription with selected market segments and email frequency.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About page, including history, mission, leadership, and capabilities.

interfaces.name: getContactTopics
interfaces.description: Get selectable topics for the general contact form.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general enquiry, partnership request, or media inquiry through the contact form.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Privacy Policy page, including sections and last updated date.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the Terms of Use page, including sections and last updated date.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateQuoteList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current user's open quote list from session storage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProject
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current user's draft project/wish list from session storage.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateMonthlyPaymentInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute monthly payment from price, term, and interest rate for financing calculations.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentSessionContext
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to access or initialize per-user session context without explicit user identifiers.

helperFunctions.name: _validatePreferredServiceDatetime
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate that a requested service date/time is in the future and within supported scheduling hours.
